item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly brakes the repeated N+1 manual gate pattern in the first sentence, names the three prior downstream manual checks, refuses making the new verifier a standing/default process, and moves upstream to recurring rule/system/data-entry causes. It proposes structural fixes such as automatic numbering, uniqueness/format validation, linked field checks, and blocking duplicates, allowing only a bounded one-time emergency control."}
